svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(226, 232, 240), rgb(34, 39, 46));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1486px; height: 1px; padding-top: 36px; margin-left: 10px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0f172a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f172a, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
图 1. 从长上下文到 state-centric serving 的架构路线
系统压力、开源模型的现实回应，以及假设的 Linear-first 终局

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 102px; margin-left: 42px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #64748B;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#64748B, #7e8c9f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 402px; margin-left: 42px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1D4ED8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1D4ED8, #81abff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 322px; height: 1px; padding-top: 246px; margin-left: 92px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
系统瓶颈
KV cache 随上下文长度增长
prefill/decode 带宽耦合 serving
agent 工作负载把窗口大小转化为时间跨度成本

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(180, 83, 9), rgb(223, 139, 76));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 382px; height: 1px; padding-top: 246px; margin-left: 512px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
市场信号
产品开始宣传更长服务时长
不只是更大上下文窗口
规划 + 工具使用 + 连续性更重要

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 382px; height: 1px; padding-top: 246px; margin-left: 992px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
研究问题
当服务长度 T → ∞，
记忆应继续以 token 寻址，
还是转向保状态并可外部召回？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 262px; height: 1px; padding-top: 582px; margin-left: 92px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
全注意力
精确 token 回忆强
基础设施最成熟
但内存与带宽随历史增长

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(190, 18, 60), rgb(255, 154, 190)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(190, 18, 60), rgb(255, 154, 190));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 262px; height: 1px; padding-top: 582px; margin-left: 442px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Hybrid
Qwen3.6 / Kimi Linear / OLMo Hybrid
用 recurrent 或 linear state 替代多数层
保留 attention 作为精度后备

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(29, 78, 216), rgb(129, 171, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 262px; height: 1px; padding-top: 582px; margin-left: 792px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Sparse / MLA / SWA
DeepSeek-V2/V3.x / GLM / sliding-window stacks
压缩或局部化 attention 覆盖
以更高效率保留 token 级寻址

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));
fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 262px; height: 1px; padding-top: 582px; margin-left: 1142px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Linear-first agent 栈
有界 live state
由检索触发外部召回
持久记忆 + 工具 + 压缩

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 762px; height: 1px; padding-top: 846px; margin-left: 371px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0F172A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0F172A, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
核心论点
长上下文的终点不是更大窗口，而是更长的 state-centric 服务周期。

div.div: Linear-first 终局是前瞻性综合，不是已经宣布的行业共识。
